tasks.description: Create packages/domain/src/Benchmark.ts with Effect Schema types: Ranking (model, right, total, pct, avgTime, timestamp, tasks pass map, taskBits, taskRefs, pricePerMOutputTokens), BenchmarkData (rankings, tasks, categories, generatedAt), ValueEntry (model, passRate, price, passPerDollar). Export schemas and TypeScript types.
tasks.acceptance: BenchmarkData schema compiles, types are exported from domain package index

tasks.description: Write reference/lambench/src/lamb.ts: a minimal Lamb interpreter in Bun TypeScript. Parser: tokenize and parse @name=term books, lambda x., application f(a,b), variables, @references. Evaluator: call-by-need beta reduction to normal form. Printer: canonical variable names (a,b,c,...). --to-bin flag: binary lambda encoding length. Serve as drop-in for lam-hs/lam binary.
tasks.acceptance: bun lamb.ts evaluates cnat_add correctly, --to-bin returns a length, tests pass

tasks.description: Update reference/lambench/src/check.ts: if lam-hs and lam are not found in PATH, default LAM_BIN to bun path-to-lamb.ts. Add reference/lambench/src/lamb.test.ts with unit tests for parse+eval of simple programs (cnat_add, bool not, identity).
tasks.acceptance: check.ts falls back to lamb.ts automatically, tests pass with bun test

tasks.description: Create reference/lambench/src/eval-runner.ts: fetches GET https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models with OPENROUTER_API_KEY, fetches https://openrouter.ai/rankings HTML to determine top 2 model IDs by rank, returns {modelId, pricePerMOutput}[] for top 2. Fallback: TOP_MODELS env var. Modify reference/lambench/src/bench.ts to accept --price-per-m flag and embed pricePerMOutputTokens in report JSON.
tasks.acceptance: eval-runner.ts outputs top-models.json with 2 entries including pricing

tasks.description: Modify reference/lambench/scripts/build.ts to output apps/client/public/data/results.json (BenchmarkData schema) instead of only docs/index.html. Include generatedAt ISO timestamp and pricePerMOutputTokens per ranking. Add reference/lambench/scripts/seed-data.ts that generates a mock results.json with 2 sample models for local dev.
tasks.acceptance: build.ts writes valid results.json; seed-data.ts creates usable mock data

tasks.description: Update apps/client/src/lib/atom.ts: remove RPC dependency, use Layer.empty runtime (no server). Delete apps/client/src/lib/rpc-client.ts and atoms/chat-atom.ts, chunker-atom.ts, upload-atom.ts. Create apps/client/src/lib/atoms/benchmark-atom.ts: Effect Atom that fetches data/results.json, returns BenchmarkData, computes ValueEntry[] (passPerDollar = passRate/pricePerMOutput) client-side.
tasks.acceptance: benchmark-atom loads results.json, Result states work correctly

tasks.description: Add Solarized CSS variables to apps/client/src/index.css alongside existing OKLCH tokens: --sol-base03 through --sol-base3, --sol-yellow, --sol-orange, --sol-red, --sol-magenta, --sol-violet, --sol-blue, --sol-cyan, --sol-green. Light mode uses Solarized light (--sol-base3 bg), dark mode uses Solarized dark (--sol-base03 bg).
tasks.acceptance: CSS variables defined for both light and dark modes

tasks.description: Create apps/client/src/components/leaderboard/VimLine.tsx, BarChart.tsx, TabLine.tsx. VimLine renders a Vim-style line with optional line number column and content. BarChart renders ASCII block bar with Solarized color thresholds (>=70% green, >=45% blue, >=20% yellow, else red). TabLine is a sticky top tab strip.
tasks.acceptance: Components render correctly in isolation

tasks.description: Create apps/client/src/components/leaderboard/TaskModal.tsx: modal overlay showing task id, category, description lines, sample tests (input/expected), per-model pass/fail icons. Closes on Escape key or overlay click. Uses VimLine for content rows.
tasks.acceptance: Modal opens with task data, closes on Escape, shows test cases and model results

tasks.description: Create IntelligencePanel.tsx, SpeedPanel.tsx, ElegancePanel.tsx in apps/client/src/components/leaderboard/. Intelligence: sorted by right desc, BarChart, right/total%. Speed: sorted by 60/avgTime desc, BarChart. Elegance: mean shorter% = (1-bits/ref)*100, BarChart with +/- axis.
tasks.acceptance: All 3 panels render with correct sorting and bar chart fill

tasks.description: Create ValuePanel.tsx: table showing Model | Pass% | Price per 1M output | Pass/Dollar ratio sorted by passPerDollar desc. Create ProblemsPanel.tsx: category filters + task list with pass/fail dots, click opens TaskModal. Create MatrixPanel.tsx: scrollable model x task grid with checkmark/cross, row click opens TaskModal.
tasks.acceptance: ValuePanel shows correct pass/dollar, ProblemsPanel filters work, MatrixPanel is scrollable

tasks.description: Rewrite apps/client/src/app.tsx: useAtom(benchmarkAtom) for data, useState for active tab (instant switch), render TabLine + 6 panels + StatusLine. Handle loading/error states. Remove all RAG imports. Delete chat-box.tsx, chunker-visualizer.tsx, upload-card.tsx, components/chunker/ directory.
tasks.acceptance: App renders leaderboard with 6 tabs, tab switching is instant, loading state shown while fetching

tasks.description: Update apps/client/vite.config.ts: add base from VITE_BASE_URL env var defaulting to /. Remove @repo/rag from optimizeDeps, fix dev server port to 3000. Create apps/client/.env.example with VITE_BASE_URL documentation. Update apps/client/package.json: remove @repo/rag dependency.
tasks.acceptance: vite build succeeds with BASE_URL configurable via .env

tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/benchmark.yml: schedule cron 0 4 * * 1 weekly Monday + workflow_dispatch. Steps: checkout, setup bun, install deps, run eval-runner to get top 2 models, run bench.ts for each, run build.ts to write results.json, commit+push results.json, vite build, deploy to GitHub Pages via actions/deploy-pages. Env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY secret, VITE_BASE_URL var.
tasks.acceptance: Workflow YAML is valid, has correct GitHub Pages deployment permissions

tasks.description: Update .github/workflows/check-client.yml: add deploy job triggered on main branch push that builds and deploys current results.json to GitHub Pages. Fix actions/checkout version from v6 to v4.
tasks.acceptance: check-client.yml has valid action versions and deploy job

tasks.description: Write reference/lambench/src/lamb.ts: minimal Lamb interpreter in Bun TypeScript. Parser: tokenize and parse @name=term, lambda x., application f(a,b), variables, @refs. Evaluator: normal-order beta reduction to full normal form (normalize under lambdas). Printer: canonical variable names (a,b,c,...). --to-bin flag: BLC encoding. NOTE: lamb.ts is a CLI script run by Bun, NOT an Effect program - plain TS is correct here since it replaces an external binary.
tasks.acceptance: bun lamb.ts evaluates cnat_add correctly (@main(0,0)=la.lb.b), --to-bin returns bit string, tests pass
